title: TaCZ Golem Compat
description: Allows humanoid golems from Modular Golems to use guns from TaCZ
body:
With this mod installed, Humanoid Golems from ModularGolems will be able to use guns from TaCZ.

Golems will have a target search range of 35 blocks regardless of zoom and accuracy of the gun. 

Golems can reload bullets from offhand, arrow slot, or dimensional storage from L2Backpack.
